title: erythrina abyssinica subsp. suberifera
intro: Erythrina abyssinica subsp. suberifera, also known as the burn plant, is a subspecies of the Erythrina abyssinica tree, native to the tropical regions of East Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Erythrina abyssinica subsp. suberifera include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as the treatment of gastrointestinal issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
